news.title:
Infosys promoters increased stake from 14.3% to 14.5% in Q3 FY26; net profit dropped 2.2% due to labor code charges.
Godrej Industries promoters hiked stake by 3.3%, nearing 75% limit; revenue hit Rs 50,512m and profit rose to Rs 2,413m.
news.summary:
Infosys promoters increased stake from 14.3% to 14.5% in Q3 FY26; net profit dropped 2.2% due to labor code charges.
Godrej Industries promoters hiked stake by 3.3%, nearing 75% limit; revenue hit Rs 50,512m and profit rose to Rs 2,413m.

news.title:
Godrej Industries addresses unusual trading volume, confirms SEBI compliance.
Company ensures timely sharing of material information and responsible disclosures.
news.summary:
Godrej Industries addresses unusual trading volume, confirms SEBI compliance.
Company ensures timely sharing of material information and responsible disclosures.

news.title:
India's market, insulated from AI exposure, may attract investors as domestic growth and currency strength improve.
Foreign cash could return as global AI-related bets face a shakeout, boosting India's anti-AI equity appeal.
news.summary:
India's market, insulated from AI exposure, may attract investors as domestic growth and currency strength improve.
Foreign cash could return as global AI-related bets face a shakeout, boosting India's anti-AI equity appeal.

news.title:
Godrej Industries' Q3 FY26 income rose 11%, PBDIT up 20%, net profit up 9%.
9M FY26 income grew 14%, PBDIT increased 28%, net profit slightly down 0.3%.
news.summary:
Godrej Industries' Q3 FY26 income rose 11%, PBDIT up 20%, net profit up 9%.
9M FY26 income grew 14%, PBDIT increased 28%, net profit slightly down 0.3%.

news.title:
Godrej Industries Ltd's board approved unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
Auditors provided an unmodified review report, and the company disclosed additional liabilities due to changes in labor codes.
news.summary:
Godrej Industries Ltd's board approved unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
Auditors provided an unmodified review report, and the company disclosed additional liabilities due to changes in labor codes.

news.title:
Godrej Industries forms a new subsidiary for its financial services business.
Godrej Capital Ltd becomes a step-down subsidiary; transaction valued at ₹3862.7 Cr.
news.summary:
Godrej Industries forms a new subsidiary for its financial services business.
Godrej Capital Ltd becomes a step-down subsidiary; transaction valued at ₹3862.7 Cr.

news.title:
Godrej Industries invested in Godrej Investment Ltd (GINVL), making it a wholly-owned subsidiary.
Godrej Capital Ltd was divested to GINVL, now a step-down subsidiary of Godrej Industries.
news.summary:
Godrej Industries invested in Godrej Investment Ltd (GINVL), making it a wholly-owned subsidiary.
Godrej Capital Ltd was divested to GINVL, now a step-down subsidiary of Godrej Industries.

news.title:
Godrej Industries acquired 100 shares of its subsidiary Godrej Investment Ltd.
It transferred its entire equity stake in Godrej Capital to Godrej Investment.
news.summary:
Godrej Industries acquired 100 shares of its subsidiary Godrej Investment Ltd.
It transferred its entire equity stake in Godrej Capital to Godrej Investment.

news.title:
Godrej Industries eyes acquisitions in consumer goods and animal feed sectors, despite high valuations of companies.
Godrej Consumer Products recently acquired Muuchstac for ₹4.5B. Group sees strong growth in India despite U.S. tariffs.
news.summary:
Godrej Industries eyes acquisitions in consumer goods and animal feed sectors, despite high valuations of companies.
Godrej Consumer Products recently acquired Muuchstac for ₹4.5B. Group sees strong growth in India despite U.S. tariffs.

news.title: Godrej Industries launches a new subsidiary to enter wealth management.
news.summary: Godrej Industries launches a new subsidiary to enter wealth management.

news.title:
FMCG players report strong Q3 recovery with volume growth, mid-single-digit revenue rise, and margin expansion.
Recovery follows GST reforms, festive demand, and raw material price softening, per updates from major listed firms.
news.summary:
FMCG players report strong Q3 recovery with volume growth, mid-single-digit revenue rise, and margin expansion.
Recovery follows GST reforms, festive demand, and raw material price softening, per updates from major listed firms.

news.title:
Godrej Industries unveils new subsidiary, Godrej Investment Limited, to expand its investment portfolio.
This strategic initiative aims to enhance growth potential for Godrej Industries.
news.summary:
Godrej Industries unveils new subsidiary, Godrej Investment Limited, to expand its investment portfolio.
This strategic initiative aims to enhance growth potential for Godrej Industries.

news.title:
Godrej Industries' Telangana investments exceed ₹10,000 cr, including a ₹150-cr dairy unit by Godrej Jersey.
Shares of Godrej Agrovet rose 3.8% to ₹597.8; plans include oil palm complex and Hyderabad housing projects.
news.summary:
Godrej Industries' Telangana investments exceed ₹10,000 cr, including a ₹150-cr dairy unit by Godrej Jersey.
Shares of Godrej Agrovet rose 3.8% to ₹597.8; plans include oil palm complex and Hyderabad housing projects.

news.title:
Nagpur Kesar India Limited acquires 6-acre Hingna land for township.
Plans high-rise residential-commercial project with Rs 900 crore revenue.
news.summary:
Nagpur Kesar India Limited acquires 6-acre Hingna land for township.
Plans high-rise residential-commercial project with Rs 900 crore revenue.

news.title:
Godrej Industries targets 12–14% revenue CAGR via chemicals, FMCG, and real estate.
FY26 EBITDA goal ₹1,426Cr (+11% YoY); expanding exports, 10Mn SqFt pipeline planned.
news.summary:
Godrej Industries targets 12–14% revenue CAGR via chemicals, FMCG, and real estate.
FY26 EBITDA goal ₹1,426Cr (+11% YoY); expanding exports, 10Mn SqFt pipeline planned.

news.title:
Godrej Industries Q2 net profit drops to ₹2.42B vs ₹2.88B YoY.
Revenue rises to ₹50.32B, EBITDA falls to ₹1.34B, margin at 2.66% vs 11.96% YoY.
news.summary:
Godrej Industries Q2 net profit drops to ₹2.42B vs ₹2.88B YoY.
Revenue rises to ₹50.32B, EBITDA falls to ₹1.34B, margin at 2.66% vs 11.96% YoY.

news.title:
Godrej Industries' Board approved Q2 & H1 FY26 financial results, showing 16% growth in total income YoY.
Godrej Properties bookings grew 64% YoY; Godrej Agrovet saw stable Dairy segment and record animal feed volumes.
news.summary:
Godrej Industries' Board approved Q2 & H1 FY26 financial results, showing 16% growth in total income YoY.
Godrej Properties bookings grew 64% YoY; Godrej Agrovet saw stable Dairy segment and record animal feed volumes.

news.title:
Godrej Industries reported ₹8 crore loss of raw materials during transit.
Company confirms no material impact on operations despite the loss.
news.summary:
Godrej Industries reported ₹8 crore loss of raw materials during transit.
Company confirms no material impact on operations despite the loss.
